# HPD.ML.Core.ProgressSubject

- Package: `HPD-ML-Core` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.Core`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.Core`
- Kind: `class`

Bridges IObservable&lt;ProgressEvent&gt; to HPD-Events. Learner implementations use this to emit progress events that are both observable via Rx and routed through the event coordinator.

## Declaration

```csharp
public sealed class ProgressSubject : System.IObservable<HPD.ML.Abstractions.ProgressEvent>, System.IDisposable
```
